description_long: This sculpture features a detailed stone figure of a young child standing atop a multi-tiered pedestal. The child is dressed in period clothing and is surrounded by a wreath of flowers at the base of the statue. The pedestal is constructed from several stacked stone blocks, with inscriptions visible on the front and sides, indicating it serves as a memorial or gravestone. The base is rough-hewn, giving a naturalistic appearance, while the upper sections are more finely finished. The overall color is a weathered gray, typical of aged stone, with some areas appearing slightly darker due to shadow or material variation. The inscriptions and the figure's features are clearly defined, suggesting careful craftsmanship.
description: A weathered stone memorial sculpture featuring a child figure atop a multi-tiered inscribed pedestal, surrounded by a floral wreath. The structure is predominantly gray and finely detailed.
description_view_0: The front view shows the child figure facing forward, with the floral wreath and the main inscription on the pedestal clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the profile of the child and reveals additional inscriptions on the side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the child figure and the full width of the pedestal, with the surname 'MCDONALD' inscribed at the base.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the opposite profile of the child and another side inscription, with the floral wreath visible from a different angle.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be designed for an outdoor setting, such as a cemetery, park, or memorial garden, based on its weathered stone material and commemorative inscriptions.
